steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase "readily ______ her work as groundbreaking" shows that other researchers reacted positively to her findings.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Acknowledged means they accepted her work as groundbreaking, fitting the signal of a ready positive reaction.
The other three either deny, downplay, or incorrectly guarantee the work, which clashes with the idea of ready recognition.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
